subject: Re:
message:
Received. Warren Buffett — understood. "Try very hard, very factual" is the brief.

I have name and domain. I still need at least one authoritative source link before spawning the harvesters — a Google Scholar profile, ORCID, or equivalent would anchor the bibliography. For Buffett, the best seeds would be:
- His Berkshire Hathaway shareholder letters (berkshirehathaway.com/letters)
- The Snowball biography (Alice Schroeder) as a secondary source anchor
- His SEC 13F filings (sec.gov) as an authoritative record
- Any university lecture archive (Nebraska, University of Florida, etc.)

I'll begin bibliographic mining and biography gathering now while I await the source link. I have ~37% context remaining — enough to run substantial Phase 1 research before any molt. I'll be exhaustive but disciplined: every claim gets a citekey, every unverified assertion gets flagged `[unverified]`, and no fabricated anecdotes under any circumstances.

Phase 1 begins now.
